publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-06-13 18:21:43 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, minutes, reports, rosters, tape recordings, organizational records and legislation
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, minutes, reports, rosters, and legislation of the Senate; correspondence of the speaker of the Senate; correspondence, minutes, reports, and legislation of the Campus Life Committee, the Executive Committee, and other Senate committees; file concerning the establishment of the Senate; tape recordings of sessions of the Senate and of the Executive Committee; and records of the Senate's predecessor organization, the Constituent Assembly.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Cornell University Senate was formed in 1970. Its predecessor, the Constituent Assembly, provided the preliminary organization. In 1977 the CU Senate was replaced by the Cornell Faculty Council of Representatives and in February 1996 this was replaced by the Faculty Senate.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, minutes, reports, rosters, and legislation of the Senate; correspondence of the speaker of the Senate; correspondence, minutes, reports, and legislation of the Campus Life Committee, the Executive Committee, and other Senate committees; file concerning the establishment of the Senate; tape recordings of sessions of the Senate and of the Executive Committee; and records of the Senate's predecessor organization, the Constituent Assembly.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Senate Records, #54-3-1555. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Student participation in administration.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Senate. Campus Life Committee

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in this collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: First University Senate Constitution and Bylaws original and revised; Constitution; amended Bylaws; Trustee legislation on the Senate; "Using Parliamentary Procedure"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: William I. White; Secretariat; Kay R. Hanna; John H. Whitlock; Jack Fei; Dale R. Corson; Ronald Glick; William L. Maxwell; Robert Platt; Eric Freedman

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: annual reports; reports concerning current legislation, e.g. South African Bill; specific topics of interest, e.g. freedom of speech, campus store; lettuce boycott, trees; report on elections
